mapper.insert: insert into orders (id, number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, amount, remark, phone, address, user_name, consignee) VALUES (#{id},#{number},#{status},#{userId},#{addressBookId},#{orderTime},#{checkoutTime},#{payMethod},#{amount},#{remark},#{phone},#{address},#{userName},#{consignee});
mapper.select: select count(*) from orders where user_id=#{userId};
select * from orders where user_id=#{userId} order by checkout_time desc limit #{index},#{pageSize};
mapper.update: update orders set status=#{status} where id=#{id};
